query: SELECT m.lineDescription, m.unitPrice, li.unitPrice as rawPrice FROM invoiceLineItemMatches m JOIN invoiceLineItems li ON li.id = m.invoiceLineItemId WHERE m.matchedItemName = 'Salmon' AND m.invoiceId BETWEEN 60012 AND 60131 LIMIT 15;
